.canvas-card-menu.background: color(srgb 0.1274 0.129133 0.1326 / 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(32, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgb(32, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgb(32, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.metadata-properties.background: rgb(32, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(32, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(37, 38, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(32, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #3f3f3f 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#3f3f3f, color-mix(in srgb, #3f3f3f 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #3f3f3f 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#3f3f3f, color-mix(in srgb, #3f3f3f 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(37, 38, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(37, 38, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(148, 226, 213, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(243, 139, 168, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(243, 139, 168, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(169, 180, 250, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(243, 139, 168, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(116, 199, 236, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(116, 199, 236, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(250, 179, 135, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(158, 158, 158, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(166, 227, 161, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

rgba(116, 199, 236, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(32, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(37, 38, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(32, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(250, 179, 135, 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(32, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(32, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

table::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
table::before.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

tbody.background: rgb(32, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead.background: rgb(32, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
